name: BACARDÍ Raspberry Rum
title: BACARDÍ Raspberry Rum | Raspberry Flavoured Rum | Fruity Rum | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A crisp blend of white rum and raspberry flavours.
marketing_description: Is it sweet? Is it tart? Or a mouth-watering combination of the two? BACARDÍ Raspberry is a crisp blend of white rum and raspberry flavours.
how_to_serve: Add BACARDÍ Raspberry to your favourite soda for a tangy treat.

faq_items.question: WHAT CAN YOU MIX FLAVORED RUM WITH?
faq_items.answer: Flavored rum gives your taste buds an extra element of surprise. You can mix flavored rum with a wide range of mixers, from simple cola to refreshing lemonade.

faq_items.question: IS FLAVORED RUM SWEET?
faq_items.answer: Flavored, fruity rums come in a range of tasting experiences, from soft and sweet to sour and tangy.

faq_items.question: HOW DO YOU MAKE RUM?
faq_items.answer: We make rum by distilling sugarcane molasses and fermenting it with yeast and water. Rum originates from Barbados with its roots going back as far as the 17th century.

raw_text_excerpt: BACARDÍ Raspberry is a crisp blend of white rum and raspberry flavours. ADD BACARDÍ RASPBERRY TO YOUR FAVOURITE SODA FOR A TANGY TREAT. BACARDÍ COCKTAILS PACKED WITH FRUIT Make simple cocktails that pack a punch. From sweet coconut to crisp raspberry, discover new recipes made with our flavoured rums.

source_metadata.description: Enjoy a bit of everything with this deeply satisfying flavored rum infused with sweet and tart notes of raspberry and citrus. Discover the full BACARDÍ Flavoured Rum Range today - great for sharing with friends
